title: viola silvatica var. nemoralis
intro: Viola silvatica var. nemoralis, also known as the wood violet, is a subspecies of the wild violet plant native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola silvatica var. nemoralis include treating digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
